entries.title: HTML Structure
entries.content: Semantic tags: header, nav, main, article, section, footer. Improves accessibility and SEO.

entries.title: CSS Flexbox
entries.content: One-dimensional layout: justify-content (main axis), align-items (cross axis). Ideal for nav bars and centered content.

entries.title: Responsive Design
entries.content: Sites adapt to screen size using fluid grids, flexible images, and media queries. Mobile-first is common practice.

entries.title: React Components
entries.content: UI built from reusable components with state and props. Virtual DOM improves update performance.

entries.title: Accessibility (a11y)
entries.content: Alt text for images, keyboard navigation, sufficient contrast, ARIA labels. Makes web usable for everyone.
